title: stachys recta var. midzorica
intro: Stachys recta var. midzorica, also known as upright wormwood, is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Stachys recta var. midzorica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and flatulence, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be incorporated into salves and ointments for topical application.
